sections.heading: PEI and Ultem Injection Molding
sections.text: PEI and Ultem Injection Molding High-performance thermoplastics that offer high heat resistance, chemical resistance, and mechanical strength. Get a Quote

sections.heading: What is PEI and Ultem Material?
sections.text: What is PEI and Ultem Material? PEI is a high-performance thermoplastic that offers high heat resistance, chemical resistance, and mechanical strength. A popular material for harsh environments, PEI is also referred to as its brand name, Ultem. We offer four types of PEI via our injection molding service: RPT 2100 LF : 10% glass fiber-filled, low flow polyetherimide. Has good tensile and flexural strength, and high impact resistance. Good dimensional stability, with high chemical resistance and excellent flame retardant. Ultem 2200 : 20% glass fiber-filled, standard flow polyetherimide. ECO Conforming, UL94 V0 and 5VA listing. NSF 51 listing, WRAS certification in recognized colors. Ultem 1...

sections.heading: Key Benefits of PEI
sections.text: Key Benefits of PEI Excellent temperature resistance and flame retardance. Good flowability. Good mechanical strength and dimensional stability. Can be sterilized. Other materials for Injection Molding We offer about 120 plastics, elastomers, and LSR for injection molding. Learn more
